missingImageStrategy.behavior: Render the catalog identity and ranking controls with a neutral non-photographic fallback; never substitute another breed or an AI-generated breed depiction.
missingImageStrategy.accessibleName: Use the canonical breed/type name; do not describe the fallback as a photo.
missingImageStrategy.visualTreatment: Use the shared monochrome keyline, a decorative abstract paw/initial mark, and the same stable aspect box as approved photography so layout does not jump.
missingImageStrategy.brokenImageTreatment: On an approved asset load error, remove the failed image from accessibility and reveal the identical fallback without retrying an unverified source URL.
missingImageStrategy.detailDisclosure: A detail view may say ‘Photo awaiting rights review’; ranking and search cards should stay visually quiet.
missingImageStrategy.publicSnapshotBehavior: Omit photography unless publicSnapshotAllowed is true for a byte-verified approved row.
missingImageStrategy.rasterExportBehavior: Omit photography unless rasterExportAllowed is true and export attribution compliance is present.
